results.question: steps for the moore weekend checks
results.description: Process lookup — returns automated 21r2 weekend restart article
results.answer_preview: Source: Kb Docs  Automated 21R2 Weekend Restart  Every Sunday, we initiate a restart of the Moore CRD servers for three environments: QA, UAT, and PROD. This process occurs at 12:30 am EST, which corresponds to 8:30 AM Dubai time, facilitated by Tidal jobs. The jobs are expected to conclude by 12:50
